data.body: Plan-review round 1 PASS advisories applied before claim: split compound acceptance criteria into atomic observable checks; replaced the weak rebar-show experiment oracle with an [operator-attested] evidence contract requiring worktree, branch, base SHA, exact commands, assertions, output, and timestamp. The dropped ADR advisory was not adopted because ADR 0015 and ADR 0017 already document the extension-boundary rationale; this epic adds the requested dogfood example rather than duplicating those decisions.
